input.content: Scott Wlaschin signing off. Good work establishing the domain foundation -- the glossary, state machines, and type-driven patterns will serve the team well through the remaining GTD implementation steps. The glossary compliance check in the pipeline should keep the ubiquitous language honest going forward.

toolUseResult.message: Shutdown approved. Sent confirmation to team-lead. Agent scott-wlaschin is now exiting.
